headline: Elo Expands Integrated Payment Portfolio with Elo Pay 15″ Tap to Pay for Point-of-Sale and Self-Service
summary: Elo, now part of Zebra Technologies, today announced the introduction of the Elo Pay 15″ Tap to Pay, a commercial-grade Android payment solution that combines a 15-inch interactive touchscreen with integrated NFC payment for retail, restaurant, hospitality and self-service environments.

headline: Should Zebra’s New Nucleus Platform and Workcloud AI Suite Require Action From Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Investors?
summary: Zebra Technologies Corporation recently expanded its software portfolio at its ZONE 2026 conference in Nashville, unveiling Zebra Nucleus and new Workcloud solutions designed to simplify device management and provide real-time, AI-enabled operational insights. This move highlights Zebra’s push to unify its software ecosystem into a single platform, aiming to turn growing frontline data flows into faster, more decisive action for IT and operations leaders.
